opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is an elephant sitting on my chest, it's crushing me, my left arm is completely numb, and I feel like I am going to die.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden severe crushing chest pain at rest for the last 45 minutes with sweating, vomiting and a feeling he is going to die.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly, 45 minutes ago while sitting watching television
symptom_narrative.duration: continuous for 45 minutes, not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: crushing, gripping pressure - 'like an elephant sitting on my chest'
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable, with a profound sense he is going to die
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: central/retrosternal chest, radiating down the inner left arm and up to the jaw
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since sudden onset; unrelieved by rest or position change
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing - rest and position changes do not help
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: drenching sweat, severe nausea with one episode of vomiting, severe breathlessness, exhaustion, and a sense of impending doom
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely immobilised by pain and distress

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home with his spouse present

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: terrified and in extreme pain; needs immediate help

communication_style.typical_message_style: can barely speak through the pain; spouse relaying and assisting

objective_data_offered.value: ashen, pale and drenched in sweat, clutching the centre of the chest
